stepDescription: Read PLAN.md, confirm dependencies, and prepare grouped Code Mode execution.
Create the app entry, shared content, base layout, and structural files before feature work.
Generate the main product sections as one grouped implementation pass, with mini code boxes per file.
Connect CTAs, forms, menus, tabs, local/demo state, and other working interactions across files.
Revisit important files for motion, hover states, mobile layout, and visual consistency.
Run available checks, start live preview, and report exact blockers instead of faking readiness.
